title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — pod-security.kubernetes.io/enforce
text:
Type: Label
Example:
pod-security.kubernetes.io/enforce: "baseline"
Used on: Namespace
Value
must
be one of
privileged
,
baseline
, or
restricted
which correspond to
Pod Security Standard
levels.
Specifically, the
enforce
label
prohibits
the creation of any Pod in the labeled
Namespace which does not meet the requirements outlined in the indicated level.
See
Enforcing Pod Security at the Namespace Level
for more information.
